resources.string: Create a private friend link for the leaderboard.
Only you see this name on your leaderboard. Your friend chooses what to call you when accepting. Invite links expire in 2 days.
Send this link to your friend
Open this Flashcards invite, sign in or sign up, and we will see each other in the app:\n\n%1$s
Remove line breaks and control characters.
You already have too many active invite links. Wait for one to expire or be accepted before creating another.
Sign in again to create an invite link.
Check the display name and try again.
Could not create the invite link. Try again.
